description: Desktop-only permissions for the main window (#760). The backing plugins (global-shortcut autostart updater) are registered behind #[cfg(desktop)] / #[cfg(not(mobile))] in lib.rs and their crates are desktop-target-scoped in Cargo.toml, so this capability is platform-scoped to match — an Android/iOS build skips it entirely instead of granting permissions for plugins that do not exist there.
